hero.name: Jay Ko
hero.headline:
Building and scaling AI products
—from tabular ML to generative video.
hero.subheadline: 6+ years leading AI product planning, launch, and scale across domains

era1.label: Era 1 · Classical ML (2018-2022)
items: Solidware (Ailys) — Won 13 Japanese enterprise clients, YoY revenue +100%

era2.label: Era 2 · LLM Application (2023-2024)
items: BUZZNI — Built AIaaS unit from 0 to 20 members, MRR 10x growth
BUZZNI — Launched Long→Short-form AI video editor and shopping assistant chatbot
Dasan E&E — Integrated AI task development workflow for business efficiency and recovery support

era3.label: Era 3 · Generative AI Native (2025~)

Cinamon MOAI — Built Motion AI evaluation platform
Chroma Awards — Sponsor Award Top 11 Finalist
